---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a preview-scoped improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What concrete workflow or limitation are you hitting?

## Current Path

Which current path are you using?

- managed localhost via `make up`
- shared Compose deployment
- repo-aware capture
- memory/retrieval research
- API-only use

## Proposed Change

What should the project do instead?

## Why This Matters

Why is this worth doing in preview?

## Scope Notes

Keep this grounded:

- what user-visible behavior should change
- what docs or install flow would need to change
- whether this is localhost-only, shared-deployment, or repo-aware behavior

## Alternatives Considered

If you already tried a workaround, include it.
